_meta.method: Web search of organisation websites and Plum Village/Soto Zen directories
_meta.coverageEstimate: ~80% of publicly listed Zen sanghas; small Plum Village lay sanghas may be missed
knownGaps: Sangha Anapnoes / Athens Plum Village lay sangha — referenced anecdotally but no live website found
Possible smaller AZI-affiliated dojos not listed on AZI directory

places.name: Zen Center Athens (Saikenji)
places.notes: Founded 2013 by Konstantinos Sgoubopoulos, dharma heir of Koten Roshi. Moved to permanent Saikenji Temple location December 2024.

places.name: Tao's Center
places.lineage: Sōtō Zen (Nishijima line) / Korean Zen (Seung Sahn line)
places.address: Northern Paros, between Naoussa and Ambelas
places.notes: Founded 2001 by Sōtō Zen master Nissim Amon (Dharma transmission from Gudo Wafu Nishijima; previously ordained by Seung Sahn). Retreat and meditation center.
